description.en:
Green Horizon Industries introduces Industrial Hemp to Farming Simulator 25.
Phase 2.4 test build: returns modDesc to descriptor version 91 for the current local FS25 test setup, keeps the Hemp Greenhouse in the valid productionPoints store category, and restores the Blender greenhouse roof shape with procedural materials.

text.name: function_ghi_hempGreenhouse
text.en: Grows industrial hemp from water and hemp seed.
